mafia.name: Mafia
mafia.description: Eliminate civilians at night. Blend in during the day.

doctor.name: Doctor
doctor.description: Choose one player to save each night. You cannot save yourself two nights in a row.

detective.name: Detective
detective.description: Investigate one player each night to learn their role.

civilian.name: Civilian
civilian.description: Find and vote out the mafia during the day. Use logic, observation, and persuasion.

jester.name: Jester
jester.description: Win by getting voted out during the day. Cause chaos and suspicion to draw votes to yourself.

nightMessages: The town falls silent as darkness takes hold...
Darkness descends upon the town. Close your eyes...
A chill runs through the air. Night has come...
The streetlights flicker and die. Shadows move in the dark...
The moon hides behind the clouds. The town sleeps uneasily...
Silence blankets the town. Not everyone will see the dawn...
The clock strikes midnight. Evil stirs in the shadows...
A cold wind sweeps through empty streets. The night begins...
dayMessages: The sun rises over the town. Time to find the truth.
A new day dawns. The town gathers in the square.
Morning breaks, but not everyone made it through the night...
Roosters crow as sunlight returns. Who survived the night?
The fog lifts to reveal the morning. The town assembles.
Dawn arrives with an uneasy silence. Accusations will fly.
The church bell rings. A new day of reckoning begins.
Sunlight streams through the windows. Time for justice.
